text:
Created attachment 151661
gitg 3.14.1

Update to 3.14.1. I see there is already PR 196178, that is similar((. My patch also adds dependency on introspection and disables python stuff, because it's only needed for extensions (there is no extensions yet). 

This also needs 196663 and 196662 committed first.
